seoTitle: How to Connect Google Chat With Trello
metaDescription: Bridge Trello boards with Google Chat spaces so card updates, comments, and due dates stream directly into your team's chat rooms.
intro: Switching between Google Chat and Trello to catch every board update wastes time your team could spend on actual work. This guide covers linking the two platforms so card activity shows up automatically inside your Google Chat spaces.

steps.heading: Open Apps & Integrations in Google Chat
steps.body: In your target Google Chat space, click the dropdown next to the space name and select Apps & Integrations or Add Apps.

steps.heading: Add the Trello bot
steps.body: Search for Trello in the app directory and click Add to bring the integration into your space.

steps.heading: Authorize the connection
steps.body: Respond to the automated Trello bot message and click Authorize, then log into your Trello profile to complete the handshake.

steps.heading: Add the Google Chat Power-Up in Trello
steps.body: Go to your Trello board, click Power-Ups, search for Google Chat, and add it to your board's configuration panel.

steps.heading: Choose which alerts to send
steps.body: Select your authorized Google space and check the boxes for events like card movements or new comments.

steps.heading: Save and test
steps.body: Click Save to activate the alert rules, then verify a test notification appears correctly in your Google Chat space.

faq.question: Do I need admin access in both Trello and Google Chat?
faq.answer: You'll need permission to add apps to your Google Chat space and the ability to add Power-Ups on your Trello board.

faq.question: Can I choose which card events trigger a notification?
faq.answer: Yes, the Google Chat Power-Up settings let you check specific boxes for events like card movements or new comments.

faq.question: What if my chat space gets too noisy with alerts?
faq.answer: You can adjust the checkboxes in the Power-Up configuration to reduce which triggers send notifications.

faq.question: How do I confirm the integration is working?
faq.answer: After saving your settings, watch your Google Chat space for a test alert to verify the connection is live.
